_notes: Hand-verified 2026-04-24. FINS3666 Assessment 2 Group Project Student Guide - this is a single-assessment guide (not a full syllabus). Course code/name are NOT in body (they were only in filename). Only one 'assessment item' is genuinely present (the group project itself).

assessmentItems.name: Assessment 2, Group Project: Trading Strategy Development, Backtesting & Evaluation
assessmentItems.format: Written Report, 2,500 Word maximum, Via Moodle / Turnitin

learningObjectives: Demonstrate an in-depth understanding of the principles, practices, and complexities of financial technology and innovation within global financial systems
Critically analyse and evaluate real-world financial problems using technological solutions and data-driven decision-making frameworks
Collaborate effectively within diverse teams to deliver well-structured and professional group outputs that reflect critical thinking and strategic planning.
